source: hand-written Phase 4 multi-hop fixture; replace with openai/simple-evals decrypted set via NEVOFLUX_BC_DATA_PATH for full upstream coverage (see eval/README-DATASETS.md)

tasks.question: The chemist who won the 1911 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was born in what is now which present-day country? Answer with the country's modern name.
What is the name of the first programming language that the inventor of the World Wide Web used to write the original WWW client at CERN? Answer with the language name only.
How many years separate the founding of the oldest continuously operating university in the English-speaking world from the year Linux was first released to the public? Answer as a number.
The director of the highest-grossing film of 1997 also directed a documentary about a famous shipwreck. In what year was that shipwreck discovered on the seabed? Answer as a 4-digit year.

The mathematician who proved Fermat's Last Theorem was awarded a knighthood in the same year a particular long-running British science fiction TV series was revived. What was that year? Answer as a 4-digit year.
